rulings.Case Title: BILLY D ROGERS VS. 3M COMPANY, FKA MINNESOTA MINING AND et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Defendant Chevron U.S.A., Inc.S Lay Witnesses Richard Davis And Steven Cavazos
rulings.Rulings: ON ASBESTOS DISCOVERY CALENDAR FOR THURSDAY, DECEMBER 12, 2013 IN DEPARTMENT 503, LINE 1, Plaintiffs¿ motion to strike defendant Chevron U.S.A., Inc.¿s lay witnesses Richard Davis and Steven Cavazos: the Court is waiting for confirmation that plaintiffs are taking this motion off calendar. If the Court does not receive such confirmation, the parties must appear at 9:00a.m. on December 12, 2013. A court reporter will not be provided by the court. If any party wishes to have the matter reported, the parties must meet and confer to agree on only one court reporter for any reported matter in this case. There will be only one official record in a case. The designated reporter must be licensed pursuant to Bus. & Prof. Code, Sec. 8016. If the parties are unable to agree on one reporter, the court will designate a qualified court reporter that will provide the official transcript for the matter. The party or parties shall pay for the cost of reporter. = (503/TLJ)
